description: Style Note Minimalist styling peppered with innovative design details, we love wearable timepieces by QnQ! Styled to perfection, this watch is the perfect accessory staple you've been looking for. Liven up the summer with this watch from QnQ!   Product Details Case style: Black stainless steel square case Dial style: Black dial with white hands Strap style: Black plastic strap with a tang clasp Features: Branding on the 9 hour mark and a screw to reset time Water resistance to 5 BAR Warranty: 1 year Size Case diameter: 35 mm Case thickness: 10 mm
